description: Loop create/resolve verbs in the UI. The attention queue already displays open loops but offers no create/resolve action — loop hygiene is terminal-only. Add create/resolve controls wired to the existing POST /api/vision/items/{id}/loops and .../loops/{loopId}/resolve endpoints the CLI already uses.

completions.notes: Stale-row reconcile (sweep 2026-06-16). Loop create+resolve verbs shipped in UI (Wave 6, 4efbf34): OpenLoopsPanel exposes onAddLoop modal + onResolveLoop, wired in App.jsx to POST /api/vision/items/{id}/loops and .../loops/{loopId}/resolve. feature.json never reconciled from PLANNED.
